intro:
Rajgir is a sacred hill town in Bihar with deep Buddhist and Jain heritage, attracting both pilgrims and a growing permanent residential population. Its scenic location and improving road connectivity have made it an emerging relocation hub. Radhe packers and movers connects you with 150+ KYC-verified packers and movers covering every locality across Rajgir.

Get instant quotes, compare vendors side by side, and book in minutes — with transparent pricing and zero hidden charges.
whyUs: Rajgir's hilly terrain and winding roads require movers who are familiar with every access point and locality. Our verified partners plan each move precisely — whether it's a local shift or a long-distance relocation from Rajgir. ₹5 lakh damage protection, live GPS tracking, and pay-after-delivery on every booking.

faqs.q: What does a local move cost in Rajgir?
faqs.a: 1 BHK from ₹2,500. 2 BHK typically ₹4,000 – ₹7,500 depending on distance, floor, and packing.

faqs.q: Do you cover all areas in Rajgir?
faqs.a: Yes — our vendor network covers all residential colonies, societies, and commercial zones across Rajgir and its outskirts.

faqs.q: Is insurance included with every booking?
faqs.a: Yes. ₹5 lakh damage protection is included automatically with every Radhe packers and movers booking at no extra charge.
